title: Lifecycle Nomenclature Inversion Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan fixing inverted amend/supersede lifecycle semantics and removing the amended parking stage.
notes: Implementation plan with checkbox task steps; not a decision record (no Context/Decision/Consequences), not a PRD (no user stories/acceptance criteria), not a SPEC (no API/schema contract) — classified as DOC (context/plan) though it contains code-level implementation detail rather than prose guidance.
